title: Csilva
compiled_truth: Csilva is an external contact at [Redsky](companies/redsky). Over the corpus period (1999-11-08 to 2001-07-24), Csilva sent 15 and received 38 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [Cameron](people/cameron-perfect) (9), [Scottwl](people/scottwl-hotmail) (8), [Psellers](people/psellers-pacbell) (7), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (5), [Prentice W Sellers](people/prentice-w-sellers-lecg) (5).
